rules.headingJumps: Detect H{n} -> H{n+2} jumps within an article body.
rules.mixedListMarkers: Detect lists that mix '-', '*' and '+' markers in the same block.
rules.smartQuoteMix: Detect strings that mix ASCII apostrophes with curly apostrophes (’).
rules.brokenAnchors: Detect intra-doc '#anchor' links pointing to a heading id that does not exist in the same article.
rules.trailingWhitespace: Detect lines inside markdown bodies that end with one or more spaces.

notes: Trailing whitespace stripped from inline markdown lines.
Stray curly apostrophes (’) inside ASCII-quoted strings normalised to ASCII apostrophe so a single string never mixes both styles.
No heading-level jumps, mixed list markers, or broken intra-doc anchors detected before or after fixes.
fixesApplied.verification: Re-running `node scripts/audit-markdown-quality.mjs` after the fixes yields all-zero counts (see summary above).
